title: fragaria vesca var. minor
intro: Fragaria vesca var. minor, also known as the woodland strawberry or alpine strawberry, is a sub-species of the wild strawberry plant, characterized by its smaller size and more delicate appearance compared to the common strawberry. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Fragaria vesca var. minor include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as supporting immune function and reducing oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in herbal infusions and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
